doctrine: Prefer SoftDent database / ODBC / Sensei DataSync / sd_* SQLite when the needed rows are available there.
The only way to get SoftDent data that cannot be reached by the database is SoftDent Sign On (env credentials) and the SoftDent UI.
When SoftDent offers Excel in Output Options: click Excel then Enter, save under C:\SoftDentReportExports, then NR2 parses the XLS/CSV (never invent dollars).

When SoftDent only offers Printer / Print Preview (no Excel): automation cannot file-ingest that report — open Print Preview in SoftDent and visually read the figures; do not invent Ins/Patient dollars from memory or guesswork.
Never SoftDent write-back or fictional vendor CLI.

sd_odbc_core.label: SoftDent ODBC / Sensei core tables
sd_odbc_core.why: Patient, procedure, payment, claim, appointment rows when ODBC/Sensei/sd_* are populated.

register.label: Register for a Period
register.why: Period production/collections and Ins Plan vs Patient split SoftDent exposes via Register Excel. NR2 parses Productions, Collections, Ins Plan Collections, Regular Collections from the XLS.
nr2Uses: Ins/Patient split when SoftDent reports it

collections.label: Collection Reports — Summary
collections.why: On this SoftDent build, Collection Summary goes to Report Setup then Print Preview — no Excel file to ingest. Open Print Preview and visually read Ins/Patient (or equivalent) figures; do not invent dollars. Prefer Register Excel when it already has the needed totals.
collections.guiMenuPath: Reports → Practice Management → Collection Reports → Summary
nr2Uses: visual Ins/Patient check when Register Ins Plan is $0

transactions.label: Trans for a Period
transactions.why: Period transaction detail SoftDent exports via Accounting → Trans for a Period Excel (when Excel appears in Output Options).
transactions.dbNote: Try sd_* first for line detail; GUI Trans Period when DB lane cannot supply the period export NR2 expects.
transactions.guiMenuPath: Reports → Accounting → Trans for a Period

daysheet.label: Daysheet
daysheet.why: Day-close daysheet updates SoftDent RCVTOT.DAT and supplies daily production/collections when Excel export is available.

aging.label: Account Aging
aging.why: A/R aging — use Excel when SoftDent offers it; if only Print Preview, visually read (do not invent).
aging.dbNote: sd_claims can support outstanding-claim views when populated.

writeoff_totals.label: Writeoff Totals
writeoff_totals.why: Insurance writeoff totals — Excel when offered; otherwise Print Preview + visual read.
writeoff_totals.guiMenuPath: Reports → Practice Management → Insurance Reports → Writeoff Totals
